brand.name: Green Empire Landscaping
brand.tagline: Long Island's Premier Landscaping & Lawn Care

services.name: Lawn Mowing & Maintenance
services.description: Regular mowing, edging, trimming, and blowing to keep your lawn looking sharp year-round. Flexible weekly and bi-weekly schedules available.
services.heroText: Keep your lawn looking its best all season long with Green Empire's professional mowing and maintenance service. We serve Hempstead and all of Nassau & Suffolk Counties.
bullets: Consistent crew assigned to your property
Flexible scheduling — we work around you

services.name: Landscape Design & Installation
services.description: Custom landscape designs that transform your outdoor space from concept to completion — plants, trees, shrubs, garden beds, and more.
services.heroText: Turn your outdoor space into something extraordinary. Green Empire's landscape design team creates custom plans for Long Island homes and businesses.

services.name: Hardscape & Patios
services.description: Patios, walkways, driveways, retaining walls, fire pits, and outdoor living spaces built with premium materials and expert craftsmanship.
services.heroText: Add real value to your property with a professionally built patio or hardscape. Green Empire handles everything from design to the final finishing touches.
bullets: Outdoor fire pits and seating walls

services.name: Tree & Shrub Care
services.description: Expert pruning, shaping, fertilization, and health treatments to keep your trees and shrubs looking great and staying healthy.
services.heroText: Healthy trees and shrubs make the whole property look better. Green Empire's tree and shrub care service covers Long Island residential and commercial properties.

services.name: Seasonal Cleanup
services.description: Spring and fall cleanups including leaf removal, bed cleanup, debris removal, and full yard preparation for every season.
services.heroText: Get your yard ready for the season with Green Empire's thorough spring and fall cleanup service. Serving all of Long Island.

services.name: Fertilization & Weed Control
services.description: Custom fertilization programs and targeted weed control for a thick, healthy, weed-free lawn that stands out in the neighborhood.
services.heroText: A great lawn starts with the right nutrition. Green Empire's fertilization and weed control programs are tailored for Long Island's soil and climate.

services.name: Mulch Installation
services.description: Fresh mulch delivery and professional installation for beds and borders — improves curb appeal and promotes plant health.
services.heroText: Fresh mulch makes a huge difference in how your property looks. Green Empire delivers and installs premium mulch throughout Long Island.

services.name: Sod Installation
services.description: Instant lawn transformation with professionally installed sod — get a lush, green, established lawn in a single day.
services.heroText: Skip the wait with professionally installed sod. Green Empire transforms bare or damaged lawns into beautiful green spaces across Long Island.

services.name: Snow Removal
services.description: 24/7 snow plowing, shoveling, salting, and ice management for residential and commercial properties across Long Island.
services.heroText: Don't get caught in a storm. Green Empire's 24/7 snow removal service keeps your property safe and accessible all winter — residential and commercial.

services.name: Commercial Landscaping
services.description: Professional grounds maintenance for HOAs, office parks, retail centers, and commercial properties throughout Nassau and Suffolk Counties.
services.heroText: Make the right first impression. Green Empire provides reliable, professional landscaping for commercial properties across Long Island.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: Green Empire completely transformed our backyard. They installed a beautiful patio and redesigned our garden beds. The crew was professional, on time, and cleaned everything up. Best landscapers on Long Island by far.

reviews.name: Sandra K.
reviews.text: I've been using Green Empire for my lawn care for two seasons and couldn't be happier. They show up every week like clockwork and my lawn has never looked better. Also did an amazing spring cleanup.

reviews.name: Robert A.
reviews.text: Green Empire handled the landscaping for our commercial property and the results were outstanding. Professional, responsive, and the whole team took pride in their work. Will definitely use them again.

faqs.q: What areas of Long Island do you serve?
faqs.a: We serve all of Nassau and Suffolk Counties, including Hempstead, Garden City, Great Neck, Hicksville, Levittown, Massapequa, Huntington, Babylon, Islip, Smithtown, and 15+ more cities. Not sure if we cover your area? Give us a call at (516) 701-3571.

faqs.q: How do I get a free estimate?
faqs.a: You can call or text us at (516) 701-3571 anytime — we're open 24/7. Or fill out the form on our website and we'll get back to you within 1 business hour.
Yes. Green Empire Landscaping is fully licensed and insured in New York State. We carry full liability insurance and workers' compensation on every job.

faqs.q: Do you offer commercial landscaping services?
faqs.a: Yes. We serve HOAs, office parks, retail centers, and commercial properties throughout Nassau and Suffolk Counties. Contact us for a commercial quote.

faqs.q: How often should I get my lawn mowed?
faqs.a: For most Long Island lawns, weekly mowing is ideal during the growing season (April–October) and bi-weekly in the cooler months. We'll recommend the best schedule for your lawn type.
Yes — we offer 24/7 snow plowing, shoveling, and salting for residential and commercial properties. Seasonal contracts are available. Call us before the season to lock in your spot.

faqs.q: What's the best time to schedule a landscape design project?
faqs.a: Spring and fall are our most popular seasons for design and installation projects. We recommend scheduling at least 2–4 weeks in advance, though we do accommodate last-minute requests when possible.
